items.question: 什么是「在地」？
items.answer: 满足两个条件：① 你所在区域与基地车路线覆盖的省市县乡重合；② 你能完成项目的组织和落地。
items.answer_en: Two conditions: ① your area overlaps with the MCV route; ② you can organize and execute a project on the ground.

items.question: 团队如何构成？
items.answer: 车上固定 3-4 人（领队、技术、媒体）。领队由柴火内部担任，其余通过招募开放。
items.answer_en: 3–4 permanent crew members (team lead, tech, media). The lead is from Chaihuo; other roles are open for recruitment.

items.question: 招募何时截止？
items.answer: 持续招募，滚动录取，招满即止。建议尽早报名。
items.answer_en: Rolling admissions — we recruit until all spots are filled. Apply early.

items.question: 申请到录取要多久？
items.question_en: How long from application to acceptance?
items.answer: 提交后 7 个工作日内回复 → 线上面试 → 通过后参加线上行前培训（项目背景、安全须知、共创原则）。
items.answer_en: Response within 7 business days → online interview → pre-departure training (project background, safety, co-creation principles).

items.question: 费用怎么算？
items.answer: 不提供薪资。参与期间的路上交通、食宿由项目承担，并购买人身保险。到达路段起点的交通费需自理。
items.answer_en: No salary. On-road transportation, accommodation, and insurance are covered. Travel to the starting point of your segment is self-funded.

items.question: 个人能收获什么？
items.answer: 成为中国首台科技共创移动实验室的核心成员；亲历 AI、开源硬件与农业、环保、教育等领域的深度碰撞；结识科技、公益、学术、媒体等多元领域的同行者。
items.answer_en: Be part of China's first tech co-creation mobile lab; experience hands-on collision of AI, open hardware with agriculture, environment, and education; connect with peers across tech, NGO, academia, and media.

items.question: 机构/企业能收获什么？
items.answer: 品牌共创与百万级曝光；与在地需求结合的技术验证与场景落地机会；深度参与 SDG 相关项目，践行科技向善。
items.answer_en: Brand co-creation with million-level exposure; real-world technology validation tied to local needs; deep involvement in SDG-related projects, advancing tech for good.
